BackgroundTiles.Name: Background layer (tiles & drawings)
BackgroundTiles.Hint: Allows marking tiles and drawings as background: they render beneath their siblings and are locked against selection unless background edit mode is active.

GroupRotation.Name: Group rotation
GroupRotation.Hint: When several tiles or drawings are selected, rotation turns the whole group around its common center instead of each object around its own axis.

RotationHandle.Name: Rotation & scale handles
RotationHandle.Hint: Shows a draggable rotation handle (follows the object's rotation) and a corner scale handle on selected tiles, drawings and tokens, like in Roll20. Hold Shift while rotating to snap to 15° steps.

ShowRotateKnob.Name: Show rotation handle
ShowRotateKnob.Hint: Show the round rotation knob on selected objects (per user).

ShowScaleKnob.Name: Show scale handle
ShowScaleKnob.Hint: Show the square stretch/compress knob on selected objects (per user).

BrushPanel.Name: Brush panel
BrushPanel.Hint: Adds a brush button to the drawing tools: quick color, thickness and a customizable palette for new drawings.

DrawingStyleBar.Name: Drawing style bar
DrawingStyleBar.Hint: Shows a floating toolbar when drawings are selected: change stroke color, thickness, fill and opacity of the whole selection at once.

TokenTooltip.Name: Token tooltips
TokenTooltip.Hint: Adds a tooltip text field to Token Settings; the note is shown near the token on hover, like in Roll20.

Brush.Title: Brush
Brush.PaletteHint: Click to use a color; right-click to remove it
